steps.title: Match the 2013 date
steps.content: On August 15, 2013 is a specific past date. The sentence therefore needs a past-tense verb for the completed publication of the profile.

steps.title: Reject nonpast tenses
steps.content: Choice A is future tense, which does not match a past date. Choice C is present tense, and Choice D is present progressive; both treat the event as current rather than completed. The simple past form matches the date. The answer is B.
